title: PM Lane 313 - Project Miner Temp Power Actuals Route Post-Redeploy Code Build Defect Gate
authority_basis: Standing PM blocker authority and repo technical authority, constrained to a fallback repo-local code/build investigation only after Lane 308 proves deployed clean-main still omits the actuals routes.
activation_condition: Lane 308 hosted evidence proves existing service apex-platform-mutation-seam is on repository jasonlswenson-sys/apex-power-ops, branch clean-main, working directory apps/mutation-seam.
Lane 308 hosted evidence proves the deployed commit matches current clean-main or later current repo head under the same bounded scope.
The admitted Temp Power actuals route files are already published in clean-main and are not still local-only modified or untracked worktree state.
The missing-route condition persists after redeploy, so further redeploy repetition is no longer the truthful next move.

active_executor_lane.lane: PM Lane 313 - Project Miner Temp Power Actuals Route Post-Redeploy Code Build Defect Gate

current_truth: Lane 308 remains the current controlling blocker until an authenticated executor actually returns a closeout.
The fallback outcome BLOCKED_HOSTED_ACTUALS_ROUTE_STILL_ABSENT_AFTER_REDEPLOY already exists in the Lane 308 prompt and closeout template.
If the admitted actuals route slice is still unpublished local worktree state, the correct next lane is a publication gate rather than this code/build-defect gate.
No packet previously existed for the repo-local follow-on if redeploy succeeded but the routes still remained absent.
This lane removes that next coordination gap without reopening hosted exploration early.
allowed_actions: Read the Lane 308 closeout and verify activation conditions before making any repo-local code decision.
Inspect route wiring, FastAPI OpenAPI registration, app include_router wiring, and build/deploy path alignment limited to the Temp Power actuals route surfaces.
Run focused local validation such as the actuals persistence test slice and a local OpenAPI presence check.
Apply the smallest repo-local code or build-surface fix needed if a bounded defect is confirmed.
not_allowed: Do not rerun hosted redeploy blindly once Lane 308 proves current clean-main is already deployed.
Do not execute hosted mutation POSTs.
Do not widen into customer-preview, finance, delivery, or source-writeback scope.
Do not introduce SQL or schema work.
Do not change auth, ingress, DNS, secrets, or service topology.
validation: Decision-label and selected-outcome marker search across touched Lane 313 files
git diff --check on touched Lane 313 files
validation_result: PASS: the fallback code/build-defect lane is now pre-authored, so a successful redeploy with still-missing routes no longer stalls on missing coordination.
